summary: Completed frontend testing of 3 new subpages in Convocatorias Management Panel. Login, navigation, and core functionality working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Instrument sections (Cuerda, Viento Madera, etc.) not expanding to show contact tables with attendance and cache fields
ui_bugs.impact: Users cannot access detailed contact management within sections

ui_bugs.issue: Economic block fields (production, transport, others) not fully visible when sections are collapsed
ui_bugs.impact: Economic data entry may be limited

design_issues.issue: Events > Sections > Contacts structure partially working - events expand but sections may not show contact details

passed_tests: Sidebar shows new sections: Plantillas definitivas, Asistencia y pagos with subnivels
Navigation to all 3 new pages working correctly
Análisis Económico - global season summary displaying
Análisis Económico - charts rendering (6 chart elements found)
Análisis Económico - Excel and XML export buttons functional
Event filter dropdown working in analytics
Contact detail table with IBAN information (6 contacts)
Previous pages (Dashboard, Configuration, Seguimiento) still accessible
Communications panel in Plantillas Definitivas opens correctly
Economic totals calculation and display working
Google Drive folder input field present
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix hierarchical structure expansion in Plantillas Definitivas - instrument sections should expand to show contact tables with attendance percentage inputs, cache euro inputs, and atril assignment fields. Ensure economic block visual differentiation is fully functional in Asistencia y Pagos.
success_percentage: frontend: 85% - Core functionality working, minor UI expansion issues
